ddt:Target.Name: JB2_0210_8C2_907_931_V1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
DID (RENAULT) : "a_dg_dgt_dat_msgdia2_jb2_xx_e_a_0(8.2).xls" DTC : a_dg_dft_cfg_failxxx_jb2_xx_e_a ---------------------------------------- JB2_0210_8C2_907_931_V1.0(CDI): -Auto ident 0210_931 VDiag $04 -Auto ident 0210_8B1 VDiag $15 $06 -Auto ident 0210_8C1 VDiag $25
JB2_0210_8C2_907_925_V1.0: -Auto ident 0210_8C2 VDiag $15 $06 $25 $04 -Added DIDs $5074 $5075 $5076 $5077
JB2_0210_8B0_907_925_V2.0: -Added screens Métier - Etat Chargeur/Etat Plug/Etat Régulation/ Etat Thermique; -MAJ the screen Developement /Means Leakage
JB2_0210_8A9_8B0_907_925_V1.0 (AJO): -Added auto ident: 0210_08A8/08A9 VDiags $15/$06; 0210_08B0/08B1 VDiag $25; 0210_08B2/08B3 VDiag $15/$06/$25 -Added DTC $0673 FT $73
JB2_0210_8A5_907_920_V3.0 (AJO) -Added Application X07ph2
JB2_0210_8A5_907_920_V1.1->JB2_0210_8A5_907_920_V2.0 (AJO) -Added DTC 0672h FT96h
JB2_0210_8A5_907_920_V1.0->JB2_0210_8A5_907_920_V1.1 (AJO) -Corrected button "Write max AC current limitation conf" from Screen "Vehicle"->"Configuration"
JB2_0210_8A0_901_V02-->JB2_0210_8A5_907_920_V1.0 (AJO) -Added DID $5070 -Added DTC $0690 FT $94 -Added Auto-Ident for JB2_0907/0908/0909/0910/0920/0921/0922/0923/0924/0925/0926/0927/0928/0929/0930 VDiag $04 ---------------------------------------
JB2_0210_8A0_901_V02-->JB2_0210_8A0_901_V2.1 (AEN) - Added Auto-Ident for JB2_906 Vdiag $04 (X07) - Added Auto-Ident for JB2_8A5: X10GEN2 (Vdiag $15) / X10 GEN3 (Vdiag $06) / L38gen2 Corée (Vdiag $15) / L38gen2 Chine (Vdiag $25)
--------------------------------------- JB2_0210_8A0_901_V01-->JB2_0210_8A0_901_V02(SON)
-Created ''Configuration JB2'' list with internal parameters in <<DEVICES>> -Updated all Datas&Requests names with the hexadecimal code of the associated DID, wrote at the begining of the name (ex: Mains phase 1 current RMS value --> ($2001) Mains phase 1 current RMS value) --------------------------------------- JB2_0210_901_V01-->JB2_0210_8A0_901_V01(SON)
- Added fault type $24(MNS_CM_H_LVL) for DTC: $0669(Cxx_dtc_hmb_mns_cm) - Added Auto-Ident for JB2_8A0 Vdiag $15
---------------------------------------- JB2_900_V1.0=> JB2_0210_901_V1.0 (10/06/2015 AAN):
DID (RENAULT) : "a_dg_dgt_dat_msgdia2_jb2_xx_e_a(10.0).xls" DTC : a_dg_dft_cfg_failxxx_jb2_xx_e_a (10.0).xls
Added DTCs: $0640 FT F3h (Cxx_dtc_hmb_mns_tot) $0667 FT 64/96h (Cxx_dtc_hmb_sens_i_dif chr/fail)
Deleted DID $5036 Vxx_mns_gnd_i_2 (according ISSUPP01628)
Added Auto-Ident Vdiag $04 for JB2_0210_901
---------------------------------------- Modification JB2_850_V4 => JB2_900_V1.0 (27/02/2015 OFE): - Manual send on write requests - New DID: $506F (R/W) PLGW card presence configuration (added in Configuration screen) - New Device : 06A0h for DTC 06A0-87 - Update screen "Vehicle"/"Configuration" by adding DID $506F - Added new Auto-Ident: X07: JB2_0887 with Vdiag $04/$06 and JB2_900 with Vdiag $04 X10 Gen3: JB2_870/871 with Vdiag $06 X10/L38 Gen2: JB2_870/871 with Vdiag $15
Modification JB2_850_V3 => JB2_850_V4 (14/03/2014 OFE)
Screen I/O updated (layout)
---------------------------------------- Modification JB2_850_V2 => JB2_850_V3 (04/11/2013 OFE) DID: a_dg_dgt_dat_msgdia2_jb2_xx_e_a(8.1).xls
Data modification for DID : - 5015 : complete state modification - 5063 : new state values
---------------------------------------- Modification JB2_850_V1 => JB2_850_V2 (04/10/2013 OFE)
Data modification for DID : - 5019 (1/2 instead of 0/1)
- 5065, 5066, 5067, 5068 (compu method (x - 32768)/16) Résolution : 0,0625 Offset : -2048

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter_2
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic
Data.Comment: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic

Data.Name: ($5008) Raw JB2 hood plug interlock value
($5009) Raw HV Battery plug interlock value
($500E) Wake-Up request from Mains or plug presence
($5016) Junction box 2 state request from EVC
($5019) Memorized value of the wake up activation
($5023) Raw CPU temperature value from BI
($5026) J1772 control pilot raw duty cycle
($5028) Mains input filter temperature from SPI
($5029) Raw AC mains phase 1 measured current
($502A) Raw AC mains phase 2 measured current
($502B) Raw AC mains phase 3 measured current
($502C) Raw AC mains phase 1 measured voltage
($502D) Raw AC mains phase 2 measured voltage
($502E) Raw AC mains phase 3 measured voltage
($5031) Raw Relay box plug interlock closed
($5032) Driver module power supply voltage from BI
($5038) Mains Plug Locking Switch raw information
($5054) Mains input filter hot spot temperature
($5055) Mains input filter hot spot temperature from SPI
($5057) Raw leakage current - DC part measurement
($5058) Raw leakage current - High Frequency 10kHz part measurement
($5059) Raw leakage current - High Frequency 1st part measurement
($505A) Raw leakage current - Low Frequency part measurement (50Hz)
($505B) Virgin neutral current acquisition tuning detection
($505D) Global checksum result on SPI frames
($505F) High part of CPU clock since power up
($5061) Low part of CPU clock since power up
($5064) Leakage current diagnostic stored completion status
($5065) Leakage DC current saved indicator after failure
($5066) Leakage HF 10kHz current saved indicator after failure
($5067) Leakage HF current saved indicator after failure
($5068) Leakage LF current saved indicator after failure
($5074) Leakage current - DC part measurement - without offset
($5076) Filtered Leakage current -High Frequency 10kHz part measurement
($5077) Leakage current - Low Frequency part measurement (50Hz)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Comment: Service de lecture de la configuration du réseau CAN

Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)
